# Zendesk Vendor Profile

**Last Updated:** 2024-10-14  
**Owner:** Finance / Customer Success  
**Classification:** Confidential

## Contract Summary

- **Plan:** Zendesk Suite Professional
- **Licensed agents:** 95
- **Annual spend:** $228,000
- **Contract term:** 2 years, expires April 2026

## Usage Metrics (Q3 2024 Average)

| Metric                  | Value      |
|-------------------------|------------|
| Tickets/month           | 11,400     |
| First reply time (avg)  | 2.8 hours  |
| CSAT score              | 88%        |
| Active agents           | 84 / 95    |
| Self-serve deflection   | 31%        |

## Cost per Ticket

At current volume: **$1.67 per ticket** — acceptable by industry benchmarks ($1.50–$2.50 for our support complexity tier).

## What's Working

- Guide (Help Center) investment has paid off — self-serve deflection grew from 22% to 31% over 12 months
- Explore dashboards are used daily by CS leadership; strong adoption
- Zendesk AI (formerly Intelligent Triage) is in pilot with 10 agents — early accuracy: ~91% intent classification

## Concerns

- 11 licensed agents inactive in last 30 days — $27,600 of annual spend with no clear ROI
- Zendesk is pushing "AI Agents" (fully automated resolution) aggressively in upsell calls; pricing is opaque
- Sunshine Conversations (messaging) add-on is on their pitch deck for our renewal — we don't need it

## Renewal Planning (April 2026)

Still 18 months out but worth tracking:
- Right-size to 85 agents before renewal
- Resist AI Agents upsell until we have a business case
- Consider whether Intercom or Freshdesk evaluations are worth running in 2025
